description: Use this API to change the value of a CON of a designated plant related model at a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_plmod_con(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_plmod_con(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Plant bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model (1 for con(j), 2 for con(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a plant-related model.
no <model type> model at this machine.
the <model type> model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no CONs used in model NAME.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
